message:
audit: batch 385 continued — rfc6330.rs (743L) + forward.rs (298L), all SOUND

Deep re-audit of raptorq/rfc6330.rs: overflow-safe prime search,
RFC tuple generation, PI walk termination proof, golden vectors.

Audit of stream/forward.rs: spin loop correctly replaced with async
send, cancel-safe forwarding, cooperative budget maintained.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
